title: lippia inaguensis
intro: Lippia inaguensis, also known as Bahama lippia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lippia inaguensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing protection against certain infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine and traditional remedies.
